rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Final recommendation text and full reproducibility evidence (notebook execution/log outputs) are truncated or not fully surfaced in the provided previews; this prevents full verification that the final recommendation uses decision_budget_usd and hard_threshold_record_count as required.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Provide the complete benchmark_report.md (untruncated) including the final recommendation and explicit budget calculation, and ensure artifact_removal_benchmark.ipynb is listed in produced_deliverable_items or attach the executed notebook output (e.g., exported outputs or stdout log) so evaluators can re-run end-to-end and confirm numeric reproducibility.
rubric_item_scores.notes: The benchmark report contains packet-scoped claims, an auditable per-record table mirroring input/task.json values, three candidate models (two linear and one monotone), per-record predictions and residuals, and a sensitivity analysis using sensitivity_shift_pct=5. Deterministic precheck confirmed artifact presence. The preview is truncated before the final recommendation section, so the economic justification referencing decision_budget_usd and final release calculus cannot be fully verified from the available preview. Notebook artifact presence is indicated in trace and original fields but not unambiguously surfaced in produced_deliverable_items, so reproducible notebook execution could not be fully re-run from the visible outputs.
